data.title: Tidio Tips: Best Ways to Use AI Chat for Support
data.excerpt: Discover the best ways to use Tidio for customer support. These tips help you turn chat into sales with AI-powered tools. Try it free today.

$media.alt: Tidio Tips: Best Ways to Use AI Chat for Support

children.text: If you run an online store or SaaS business, you know the pain: customers ask the same questions over and over. Shipping times. Return policies. Product specs. Answering these manually eats your team's time and delays responses.
That's where Tidio changes everything. This AI-powered platform combines live chat, chatbots, and help desk tools in one place. The result? Faster support, happier customers, and more sales.
I've tested dozens of customer support tools. Tidio stands out because it blends AI automation with human touch perfectly. You don't have to choose between efficiency and personal service.
In this guide, I'll share the best ways to use Tidio, highlight its standout features, and help you decide if it's right for your business.
*Disclosure: This post contains affiliate links. If you sign up through them, I may earn a small commission at no extra cost to you.*
Start your free Tidio trial here
and see how AI support transforms your customer experience.
What Is Tidio and Why It Stands Out
Tidio is an all-in-one customer service platform built for online businesses. It combines three powerful tools:
Live Chat
: Real-time conversations with website visitors
AI Chatbot (Lyro)
: An AI agent that handles common questions automatically
Help Desk
: A unified inbox for managing all support conversations

What makes Tidio special? Lyro, their AI agent, doesn't just spit out generic responses. It learns from your help center and FAQ content to give accurate, context-aware answers. It feels human to your customers.
Want to learn more about the platform fundamentals? Check out our
what is Tidio
guide for a deeper dive.

The platform works across multiple channels too. You can manage conversations from your website, email, Facebook Messenger, Instagram, and WhatsApp—all from one dashboard. No more switching between tabs.
Best Ways to Use Tidio for Your Business
Here are the tips and strategies that deliver real results with Tidio.
Tip 1: Let Lyro Handle Repetitive Questions
Your support team shouldn't spend hours answering "Where's my order?" or "What's your return policy?" These questions have simple answers.
Lyro handles them instantly. It pulls information from your existing help center and knowledge base to provide accurate responses 24/7.
How to set it up:
1. Connect your help center to Tidio
2. Add your FAQ content to Lyro's training data
3. Review Lyro's suggested answers and approve them
4. Let it handle incoming questions
Most businesses see Lyro resolve 40-60% of incoming conversations without human intervention. That's huge for small teams.
Tip 2: Create Smart Chat Flows for Sales and Support
Tidio's flow builder lets you create automated conversation paths. These aren't your typical boring chatbots that frustrate customers.
Effective flow ideas:
Welcome flow
: Greet visitors and guide them to products or answers
Cart abandonment flow
: Reach out when someone leaves items in their cart
Lead qualification flow
: Ask questions to understand visitor needs before connecting them to an agent
Feedback collection flow
: Gather reviews and satisfaction data after a purchase
The visual drag-and-drop builder makes this easy. You don't need coding skills to create sophisticated flows.
Tip 3: Use AI Product Recommendations to Drive Sales
Here's where Tidio gets really powerful for e-commerce. Lyro doesn't just answer questions—it suggests products based on the conversation.
For example, if a customer asks about running shoes, Lyro can recommend specific models from your store with direct links. This turns every support interaction into a potential sale.
See how Tidio's AI product recommendations work
This feature alone can pay for your Tidio subscription many times over. Support conversations become revenue opportunities.
Tip 4: Customize the Chat Widget to Match Your Brand
First impressions matter. Tidio lets you customize every aspect of the chat widget:
Colors and fonts to match your brand
Custom greeting messages for different pages
Your team's photos and names for a personal touch
Position and size on the screen

Pro tip: Use different greetings for different pages. A visitor on your pricing page gets a different message than someone browsing products. This contextual approach increases engagement significantly.
Tip 5: Set Up Smart Routing and Business Hours
Not every question should go to AI. Tidio lets you create rules for when conversations get transferred to human agents:
Complex technical questions
Billing disputes
Conversations where Lyro detects customer frustration
High-value customers or VIP segments
You can also set business hours so customers know when live agents are available. Outside those hours, Lyro takes over seamlessly.
For a complete walkthrough, read our
how to use Tidio
tutorial.
New and Standout Features You Should Know
Tidio constantly improves its platform. These recent features deserve your attention:
Lyro AI Agent
The latest evolution of their AI chatbot handles more complex queries than ever. Lyro now provides:
Multi-turn conversations
: It remembers context throughout the conversation
Product recommendations
: Suggests relevant items from your store
Multilingual support
: Communicates in multiple languages automatically
Smart handoff
: Knows when to involve a human agent
Unified Help Desk
Tidio now offers a complete help desk with:
Ticket management and prioritization
Collision detection (so two agents don't reply to the same message)
Customer profiles with conversation history
Analytics and performance reporting
Integrations
Tidio connects with the tools you already use:
Shopify, WooCommerce, BigCommerce
WordPress
Facebook Messenger, Instagram, WhatsApp
Email platforms
Zapier for custom integrations
Want the full feature breakdown? Explore our
Tidio new features
article.
Who Is Tidio Ideal For?
Tidio works best for specific types of businesses. Here's who benefits most:
E-commerce Stores
Online retailers love Tidio because it directly impacts sales. Product recommendations, cart abandonment recovery, and instant order status updates create a seamless shopping experience.
Whether you run a Shopify store or WooCommerce shop, Tidio integrates natively and starts delivering value immediately.
SaaS Companies
Software businesses use Tidio for onboarding support, feature explanations, and technical troubleshooting. Lyro handles common "how do I" questions while your team focuses on complex issues.
Small Support Teams
If you have 1-5 support agents, Tidio multiplies their effectiveness. Lyro handles the repetitive work so your team tackles high-value conversations.
Growing Businesses
Tidio scales with you. Start with the free plan and upgrade as your conversation volume grows. The pricing adapts to your needs.
See more
Tidio use cases
across different industries.
Ideal for:
Online stores with 100+ monthly visitors
SaaS companies with user bases under 50,000
Support teams handling 50-2,000 conversations monthly
Businesses that want to reduce support costs while improving customer satisfaction
Less ideal for:
Enterprise companies needing complex CRM integrations
Businesses with extremely specialized support requirements
Tidio Pricing: What to Expect
Tidio offers flexible pricing based on your usage:
Free Plan:
50 conversations per month
Basic live chat features
Limited chatbot functionality
Paid Plans:
Start at around $29/month
Scale based on conversation volume
Include Lyro AI conversations
Add advanced automation and analytics
Key pricing details:
Conversations are billable conversations (live + AI)
You can calculate costs based on monthly usage needs
Plans range from 50 to 2,000+ billable conversations
Add-ons available for specific features
The cost-per-conversation decreases as you scale, making it affordable for growing businesses.
Check Tidio's pricing and start your trial
Getting Started: Your First Steps with Tidio
Ready to implement Tidio? Here's your action plan:
Week 1: Setup and Basic Configuration
1. Create your Tidio account
2. Install the widget on your website
3. Customize the appearance to match your brand
4. Add your team members
Week 2: Connect Your Knowledge Base
1. Import your FAQ content
2. Connect your help center
3. Set up Lyro's initial training
4. Test AI responses for accuracy
Week 3: Build Your First Flows
1. Create a welcome flow for new visitors
2. Set up a cart abandonment flow
3. Design a lead qualification flow
4. Configure business hours and routing rules
Week 4: Optimize and Scale
1. Review Lyro's performance analytics
2. Identify common questions that AI handles well
3. Adjust responses and add new content
4. Expand to additional channels (email, social media)
For more detailed guidance, read our
why choose Tidio
breakdown.

Final Thoughts
Tidio isn't just another chat tool. It's a revenue-generating, customer-delighting platform that pays for itself.
The combination of AI automation and human support creates an experience your customers will love. Your team stays efficient. Your customers get instant answers. Your sales increase.
The free plan lets you test everything risk-free. There's no reason not to try it.
Start your free Tidio trial today
and discover why thousands of businesses trust it for customer support.

children.text: Is Tidio free to use?
Yes, Tidio offers a free plan that includes 50 conversations per month, basic live chat features, and limited chatbot functionality. This lets you test the platform before committing to a paid plan.
How does Tidio's AI chatbot Lyro work?
Lyro learns from your existing help center and FAQ content to answer customer questions automatically. It handles common queries 24/7 and escalates complex issues to human agents when needed.
Can Tidio integrate with my e-commerce platform?
Yes, Tidio integrates natively with Shopify, WooCommerce, and BigCommerce. It also works with WordPress and connects to Facebook Messenger, Instagram, WhatsApp, and email platforms.
